title: Mila Upvc Door Lock 35mm Backset Gearbox Coldseal Upvc Twin Dual Spindle 35mm Backset / 92mm / 70mm PZ Centres
features: A replacement centre case gearbox designed for the Mila Coldseal multipoint door lock system. If your door lock is malfunctioning, the gearbox is usually the culprit. Replacing it is a straightforward process that involves removing just a few screws.
Key Measurements: 35mm Backset / 92mm / 70mm PZ Centres Functions as the internal mechanism controlled by the door handle
Most common component to fail in a lock system Reversible latch suitable for both left and right-handed doors
Double spindle design – compatible with lever/lever and lever/pad configurations
description: Mila uPVC Door Lock 35mm Backset Gearbox Coldseal uPVC Twin Dual Spindle A replacement centre case gearbox designed for the Mila Coldseal multipoint door lock system.
